column1: #   id        the case id (free text; unique within the file).
#   formula   the formula text as typed in a cell (e.g. =AVERAGE(A1:A3)).
#   setup     cell preloads, ';'-separated (A1=1;A2=2); '-' means no setup.
#   expected  the General-formatted result, or an error literal (#DIV/0!, #VALUE!, …).
# AVERAGE skips non-numeric cells in ranges; AVERAGE of nothing is #DIV/0!;
# scalar bool/numeric-text ARE coerced (TRUE->1, "3"->3). Feeds the Phase-2
